title: LogAttributes
description: The attributes of a log event returned from the search API

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the log was generated

status.description: The log level or severity status of the event

host.description: The hostname of the machine that generated the log

service.description: The name of the application or service that generated the log

source.description: The technology source that generated the log (e.g., nginx, java)

tags.description: List of tags associated with the log event in key:value format

attributes.description: Custom key-value attributes extracted from the log message
